title: Legit Warning-LATCH is suppressed by incomplete case with default

features.name: incomplete case with empty default suppresses LATCH warning
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with a case statement that does not cover all possible values but has a default:; empty statement, causing the LATCH warning to be incorrectly suppressed

features.name: unsized constant in case item suppresses LATCH warning
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with a case statement using an unsized constant (e.g., 0 instead of 2'd0) and no default, causing the LATCH warning to be incorrectly suppressed
